description: Draws a line between two points using an animated ruler instrument. The result behaves as a line and can be used by other expressions.
utility: Draw a straight line with ruler animation — result is reusable as a line geometry

examples.scenario: Draw ruler line segment between two points with comment
examples.expression:
graph_1=g2d(at(1,8),size(23),range(-1,12),grid(noaxes),type(geometry))
point_A=point(graph_1,2,1,label("A"))
point_B=point(graph_1,7,1,label("B"))
line_a=rulerline(graph_1,point_A,point_B,comment("Draw segment a = AB between points A and B"),t(2))

examples.scenario: Draw triangle sides with ruler line
